Comfortable Accommodations: Location Bellevue - Pomme Cannelle in Saint-Louis offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and sea views. Each room includes a balcony or terrace, wardrobe, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace, enjoying the lush surroundings. The property features a private entrance and free WiFi throughout, ensuring connectivity and comfort.
Convenient Amenities: The guest house provides free on-site private parking, a TV, and a shower. Additional amenities include tiled floors, a private bathroom, and a soundproofed environment, catering to all guest needs.
Accessible Location: Marie-Galante Airport is 17 km away, offering easy travel options.

Comfortable Living Space: Kazaperrok in Grand-Bourg offers a spacious apartment with one bedroom and a king-size bed. The ground-floor unit features a terrace and a garden, providing a relaxing outdoor area.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen with a coffee machine, microwave, and dishwasher. Additional amenities include a washing machine, streaming services, and a private entrance.
Relaxing Facilities: The apartment includes a hot tub and a terrace, perfect for unwinding. Free on-site private parking is available for convenience.
Breakfast and Location: A continental breakfast with juice and pancakes is served daily. Marie-Galante Airport is located 9 km away, providing easy access for travellers.
